target.title: docs: use routed test command in Bun guide
target.body:
## Summary
- Replace the Bun guide's raw `bun run vitest run` example with the repo-routed `pnpm test` command.
- Keeps the page's Bun build example while pointing tests at OpenClaw's supported test dispatcher.

## What Problem This Solves
The Bun install guide currently tells contributors to run Vitest directly through Bun. OpenClaw's contributor/test docs route test execution through `pnpm test`, which selects the right scoped Vitest lanes and repo scheduling behavior. This updates the Bun guide so the test command matches the documented repo workflow.

## Evidence
- The only code/docs change is `docs/install/bun.md`, replacing one command in the Build and test step.
- Local docs gate passed: `DOCS_I18N_GLOSSARY_BASE=upstream/main pnpm_config_verify_deps_before_run=false pnpm check:docs`.
- Whitespace check passed: `git diff --check`.

## Test Plan
- `DOCS_I18N_GLOSSARY_BASE=upstream/main pnpm_config_verify_deps_before_run=false pnpm check:docs`
- `git diff --check`

## AI assistance
- AI-assisted change; I reviewed the diff and local docs checks above.
